title: Generating Graph-like Rules for Knowledge Graph Reasoning via Diffusion Models
author: arXiv cs.AI
summary: This paper proposes a novel framework that leverages diffusion models to generate graph-like logical rules for knowledge graph reasoning. By transforming rule learning into a generative process, the method captures complex relational dependencies and enhances reasoning accuracy and interpretability. The work bridges the gap between neural generative models and symbolic reasoning, offering a promising direction for knowledge graph completion.
